query:
SELECT 
  id,
  apiFootballEnabled,
  apiFootballKey IS NOT NULL AND apiFootballKey != '' AS hasKey,
  LEFT(apiFootballKey, 8) AS keyPrefix,
  apiFootballQuotaLimit,
  apiFootballSyncFixtures,
  apiFootballSyncResults,
  apiFootballLeagueId,
  apiFootballSeason,
  apiFootballLastSync,
  apiFootballCircuitOpen,
  apiFootballCircuitOpenAt
FROM platform_settings
WHERE id = 1;

  apiFootballQuotaLimit,
